headline: EMCOR (EME) Stock Could Be 43% Undervalued Following Raised 2026 Guidance
summary: EMCOR Group has delivered an extremely strong multi year share price return, yet its current valuation still screens as cheap on both intrinsic value estimates and traditional multiples. This sets up a clear question about how much of its infrastructure opportunity is already reflected in the stock. EMCOR Group has returned more than 7x over the past 5 years, which puts recent short term pullbacks into a much longer track record of very large gains. Federal and state infrastructure spending...

headline: 1 Large-Cap Stock on Our Buy List and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Large-cap stocks are known for their staying power and ability to weather market storms better than smaller competitors. However, their sheer size makes it more challenging to maintain high growth rates as they’ve already captured significant portions of their markets.
